title: terminalia costaricensis
intro: Terminalia costaricensis, also known as Costus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Costaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Terminalia costaricensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide relief from fever and other infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's root and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
